text_style_rules: Concise Russian copy for exchange, news, warnings, subscriptions and contests. Tone is direct, trustworthy and easy to scan.
image_style_rules: Friendly but alert ghost/exchange/news promo style, modern digital finance mood, enough contrast for overlay title.
composition_rules: Generate or select a styled base image, then render readable Russian title/subtitle as composer overlay.
negative_rules: Avoid fake guarantees, random finance logos, misleading charts, unreadable small text and excessive visual noise.
asset_rules: Use saved Casper references, safe backgrounds and overlay templates. Fallback must still be styled, not plain empty background.
telegram_examples: сделай новую задачу для каспера конкурс на 3000 пользователей
